advisory_closure.blocking_policy: Route-repeat audit blocks only on missing GPX, hidden self-repeat, latent credit without ownership/repeat decision, unpriced repeat, or proven avoidable post-credit repeat. High ratio, high non-credit, high declared-repeat, and same-trailhead bundle rows are optimization pressure signals.
advisory_closure.closure_reason: No repeat-accounting hard failures remain and all optimization warnings have a current adversarial disproof record.
